docs.title: About
docs.text: Javier Iparraguirre is a machine learning leader and researcher with a background spanning industry, academia, and international scholarship.

docs.title: Education
docs.text: He holds a Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in Engineering from Universidad Nacional del Sur and a Master of Science (MS) in Computer Science from the University of Illinois at Chicago, where he studied as a Fulbright Scholar.

docs.title: Research Interests
docs.text: His technical focus is on machine learning, unsupervised learning, and video processing. He has authored a book and multiple peer-reviewed scientific publications.

docs.title: Professional Experience
docs.text: Javier currently works as Director of Machine Learning at Teladoc Health. He also serves as Adjunct Professor in the Electronics Engineering Department at Universidad Tecnológica Nacional, Bahía Blanca, and has over a decade of experience providing technical consulting to private and public organizations.
